from typing import List, Dict, Any

def process_items(items: List[str] = []) -> List[str]:
    items.append("processed")
    return items

def build_config(overrides: Dict[str, Any] = {}) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    config = {"default": True}
    config.update(overrides)
    return config

def create_record(tags: List[str] = [], metadata: Dict[str, Any] = {}) -> dict:
    return {"tags": tags, "metadata": metadata}

def aggregate_results(data: List[dict] = [], key: str = "value") -> List[Any]:
    return [item[key] for item in data]

def transform_batch(items: List[int] = [], factor: float = 1.0) -> List[float]:
    return [x * factor for x in items]
